name: Coronamon

signature_move.name: Corona Flame
signature_move.description: A flaming shot which concentrates the power of flame in its brow while exhausting all of its body's stamina, then fires it at the opponent.

description: A Beast Digimon born from fusing with solar observation data. It has a strong sense of justice and a pure, innocent personality. Its Special Moves are releasing continuous punches with its fists heated by the power of flame ( Corona-knuckle ), and concentrating the power of flame in its brow while exhausting all of its body's stamina, then firing it at the opponent as a flaming shot ( Corona Flame ). Also, it can either defend itself or ram the opponent while its body is clad in flames ( Petit Prominence ).
